headline: The Smartest Dividend Stock to Buy With $100 Right Now
summary: Looking for a dividend stock that pays a solid yield and doesn't cost an arm and a leg? Look no further than VICI Properties.

headline: A Look At VICI Properties (VICI) Valuation As Recent Share Momentum Meets Intrinsic Discount Estimate
summary: Why VICI Properties is on investors’ radar VICI Properties (VICI) has drawn investor attention after its recent share performance, with the stock showing mixed short term moves alongside modest gains over the past month and past 3 months. For context, VICI is an S&P 500 experiential real estate investment trust focused on gaming, hospitality, wellness, entertainment and leisure assets, including prominent properties on the Las Vegas Strip under long term, triple net lease agreements.
